description_long: This is a classic Chesterfield-style sofa upholstered in a warm brown fabric, featuring deep button tufting along the backrest and armrests. The sofa has a low, continuous back and arm profile, both of which are rolled and generously padded, creating a luxurious and inviting appearance. Two large, loose seat cushions rest atop the base, providing ample seating space for multiple people. The upholstery appears to be a soft, matte fabric, likely microfiber or velvet, with a subtle texture and no visible patterns aside from the tufting. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are either recessed or the sofa sits low to the ground. This piece exudes a timeless, elegant charm suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A brown, Chesterfield-style sofa with deep button tufting, rolled arms, and two large seat cushions. The upholstery is soft and matte, with a classic, inviting look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, deep button-tufted backrest, rolled arms, and two large seat cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rolled armrest, thick padding, and the depth of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and seat depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions placed side by side; backrest and armrests are fully tufted and padded, with no separate back cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled, fully padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, featuring deep button tufting and a classic Chesterfield profile.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, likely recessed or hidden beneath the sofa base, giving a grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, high backrest with a rolled top edge, fully tufted with deep buttoning, matching the armrest height and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown fabric with a deep button-tufted pattern on the backrest and armrests, creating a quilted, textured appearance.
